Contact Us

Questions, corrections or feedback — we'd like to hear from you.

The best way to reach us is by email. We read every message and aim to reply to genuine enquiries.

Email

info@malaysianopentennis.com

Corrections

Found an error in a guide, result, or tournament listing? Email us with the page link and the correct information (and a source if you have one). See our editorial policy for how we handle corrections.

What we can't help with

We're an independent information site. We don't sell tickets, register players for tournaments, or represent any organiser. For entries, please contact the relevant tournament organiser or LTAM directly.

This site is static and does not collect form submissions. Please use the email address above.

Last updated: 18 June 2026

Malaysian Open Tennis

Tournaments, records and resources for Malaysian tennis — independent and editorial-first.

MalaysianOpenTennis.com is an independent tennis and sports information website. We provide educational guides, tournament resources, and editorial content for Malaysian tennis fans and players.
© 2026 malaysianopentennis.com. All rights reserved. Independent site — not affiliated with the ATP, WTA, BWF, PSA, LTAM, or any tournament organiser.
